_comment: Authoritative per-agent spawn-time prompt-inventory budgets, enforced by scripts/check-token-budget.sh. Weight = agent .md + every frontmatter-preloaded SKILL.md, measured as an OFFLINE PROXY (bytes / proxy_bytes_per_token). This is NOT an Anthropic token count and does NOT track live tokenizer inflation — it is a ratchet on prompt inventory growth only. ARCHITECTURE_CONTRACTS.md §'Prompt Token Budgets' mirrors this file for humans; THIS JSON is the single source of truth the gate reads. Keys are agent filename stems (loomwright/agents/<stem>.md). NOTE: the gate consumes ONLY .agents[<stem>].budget — the `measured` and `note` fields (including the '... N preloaded skills' counts in each note) are DECORATIVE, FROZEN authoring-time metadata the gate never re-derives or asserts (do not chase or re-bump them each release; they are authoring snapshots, like CLAUDE.md's frozen-example-value convention). The live preloaded-skill count IS computed and printed per run, but is not gated against these notes. The proxy sizes the whole .md/SKILL.md incl. frontmatter — a deliberate, safe over-count, not the literal system prompt.
proxy_label: proxy tokens (bytes/4 — offline proxy, not an exact Anthropic count)
raise_rule: To raise a budget, edit its .agents[<stem>].budget here in the SAME PR that breaches it and add a one-line justification to that agent's `note`, AND update the mirrored row in ARCHITECTURE_CONTRACTS.md §'Prompt Token Budgets' in the same edit (that table is a human mirror, not yet machine-synced to this JSON). The gate reads this JSON, so every raise is visible in the PR diff and reviewable. Budgets are a ratchet against unmeasured growth, not a hard diet — shrinking prompts is separate follow-up work. Initial budgets = measured proxy value at authoring time (v15.10.0) + ~10% headroom, so no agent fails at introduction.

launch-pad.note: authoring baseline v15.10.0; 7 preloaded skills (name: loomwright:launch-pad-runner)

review-pr.note: authoring baseline v15.10.0; 2 preloaded skills (name: loomwright:review-pr-runner)

supervisor.note: authoring baseline v15.10.0; 7 preloaded skills (name: loomwright:supervisor-runner)
